ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., strategy, puzzle, adventure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_game_genres" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the player */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player playing the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the player's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the player */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game state */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the state belongs to */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the game state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_states" (
  "player_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game state */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the state belongs to */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game state */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "transition_time" TEXT /* Time of state transition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_tree" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game tree */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the tree belongs to */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "parent_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent node */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transposition_tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transposition table */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the table belongs to */,
  "table_size" INTEGER /* Size of the transposition table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_metrics" (
  "player_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player metric */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., score, time spent) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_metrics" (
  "game_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game metric */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., branching factor, depth) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being rated */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player providing the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the player (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review provided by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system resource */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the resource belongs to */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., CPU, memory) */,
  "resource_value" REAL /* Value of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_resources_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES system_performance ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_resources_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES system_configurations ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system performance metric */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system configuration */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
